install.macos_download: Open https://gemini.google/mac/ in the browser to download the official .dmg. Saves to ~/Downloads by default.
install.windows: NOT SUPPORTED. Gemini Desktop is macOS-only. If the user is on Windows or Linux, tell them: 'Gemini Desktop only supports macOS. Use the web version at https://gemini.google.com/ on Windows / Linux.'
install.linux: NOT SUPPORTED. Gemini Desktop is macOS-only.
install.note: Mac-only GUI desktop application. Tell the user the download location and ask them to follow the install steps (drag Gemini.app to /Applications).

install_flow.summary: Download .dmg → user double-clicks → drags Gemini.app to /Applications
agent_steps: Verify OS is macOS first. If not, refuse with the message above.
After download finishes, tell the user the EXACT file path (e.g. '~/Downloads/Gemini.dmg').
Tell the user: 'Gemini 安装窗口已打开,请把 Gemini.app 拖到 Applications 文件夹完成安装。' / 'The .dmg is open — drag Gemini.app to your Applications folder.'
Do NOT try to automate the GUI install.
tell_user: That they should drag Gemini.app to /Applications

blocked_regions.zh-CN: gemini.google may be blocked in mainland China — a VPN/proxy is usually required.
